title: Cormonema ovalifolium
taxonomy: Cormonema ovalifolium is a species of flowering plant in the family Santalaceae. It is a type of hemiparasitic plant that obtains some of its nutrients by parasitizing the roots of other plants. The classification of Cormonema ovalifolium is as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Eudicots, clade Asterids, order Santalales, family Santalaceae, genus Cormonema, species C. ovalifolium. This classification indicates its position within the plant kingdom and its relationships to other plants. Further research may be necessary to confirm the classification of this specific plant species.
